meta.name: Richard PERRET
meta.title: Software Engineer
meta.tagline: Turning real-world needs into scalable technical architectures — tech enthusiast, sports lover, problem solver

projects.title: Agentic AI Platform
projects.description: Agentic loop architecture with real-time SSE streaming, dynamic context window management, and a configurable tool factory. Hybrid RAG over Google Docs with chunked embeddings and semantic search. Parallel tool execution, trilingual UI (FR/EN/ES).

projects.title: Arya
projects.description: Cross-platform mobile app for sports coaching and performance tracking across any discipline. Personalized workouts, metrics, and progression follow-up.

projects.title: Portail & Reference
projects.description: Internal platform suite: Portail — a centralized web app for project/contract/billing/HR/helpdesk/comms with modular architecture and granular per-role permissions; Reference — the REST API powering the whole IS (~30 ORM models, 38 route modules, i18n, soft deletes, Content-Range pagination). Redis caching, query tuning, N+1 elimination, full CI/CD (flake8, mypy, pytest, Trivy).
